name: divi5-tools
description: Divi 5 toolkit: SEO-optimised landing page JSON generator, design/SEO reviewer for any Divi 5 export, brand-guide-to-global-variables converter, one-command import into Local WP sites with draft preview and publish-on-accept, and a Theatre.js (@theatre/core 0.7.0) reference for building the DiviTheatre animation plugin's motion engine and presets.
